title: The agent shall ingest incoming support emails from the mailbox/queue and create one triage record per email.
statement: The agent shall ingest incoming support emails from the mailbox/queue and create one triage record per email.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-001", "Statement": "The agent shall ingest incoming support emails from the mailbox/queue and create one triage record per email.", "Source": "input (ingest pipeline); `DEP-002`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall classify each email into a category and an urgency level per the Support-Ops taxonomy.
statement: The agent shall classify each email into a category and an urgency level per the Support-Ops taxonomy.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-002", "Statement": "The agent shall classify each email into a category and an urgency level per the Support-Ops taxonomy.", "Source": "input (classify); `ASM-002`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall retrieve relevant knowledge-base context for an email before drafting a reply.
statement: The agent shall retrieve relevant knowledge-base context for an email before drafting a reply.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-003", "Statement": "The agent shall retrieve relevant knowledge-base context for an email before drafting a reply.", "Source": "input (retrieve); `DEP-003`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall draft a proposed reply grounded in retrieved context, citing the sources for its claims, or defer to a human when it cannot ground an answer.
statement: The agent shall draft a proposed reply grounded in retrieved context, citing the sources for its claims, or defer to a human when it cannot ground an answer.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-004", "Statement": "The agent shall draft a proposed reply grounded in retrieved context, citing the sources for its claims, or defer to a human when it cannot ground an answer.", "Source": "input (draft, grounded); `INV-002`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall route or escalate an email to the correct human queue when classification confidence is low or the category is sensitive.
statement: The agent shall route or escalate an email to the correct human queue when classification confidence is low or the category is sensitive.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-005", "Statement": "The agent shall route or escalate an email to the correct human queue when classification confidence is low or the category is sensitive.", "Source": "input (route/escalate); `ASM-002`; `OQ-002`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall require explicit human approval before any reply is sent to a customer (human-in-the-loop).
statement: The agent shall require explicit human approval before any reply is sent to a customer (human-in-the-loop).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-006", "Statement": "The agent shall require explicit human approval before any reply is sent to a customer (human-in-the-loop).", "Source": "input (human approval before send); `INV-001`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall log every action, tool call, and decision — with inputs, outputs, and rationale — to an append-only audit trail.
statement: The agent shall log every action, tool call, and decision — with inputs, outputs, and rationale — to an append-only audit trail.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-007", "Statement": "The agent shall log every action, tool call, and decision — with inputs, outputs, and rationale — to an append-only audit trail.", "Source": "input (full audit log); `INV-004`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: The agent shall auto-send replies for an explicitly whitelisted set of low-risk categories, after sustained measured accuracy and an approved decision.
statement: The agent shall auto-send replies for an explicitly whitelisted set of low-risk categories, after sustained measured accuracy and an approved decision.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "FR-008", "Statement": "The agent shall auto-send replies for an explicitly whitelisted set of low-risk categories, after sustained measured accuracy and an approved decision.", "Source": "input (later auto-send); `ASM-005`; `OQ-001`; gated by `EXP-001` / `ADR-0004`", "Priority": "Full", "Status": "Proposed"}}

title: Classification shall meet the accuracy bar: ≥ 85% top-1 category accuracy on the labeled eval set; urgency accuracy measured and reported separately.
statement: Classification shall meet the accuracy bar: ≥ 85% top-1 category accuracy on the labeled eval set; urgency accuracy measured and reported separately.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "NFR-001", "Statement": "Classification shall meet the accuracy bar: ≥ 85% top-1 category accuracy on the labeled eval set; urgency accuracy measured and reported separately.", "Source": "input (accuracy); `ASM-005`; `OQ-003`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: End-to-end triage latency shall be ≤ 30 s per email at p95, from ingest to draft-ready-for-review.
statement: End-to-end triage latency shall be ≤ 30 s per email at p95, from ingest to draft-ready-for-review.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "NFR-002", "Statement": "End-to-end triage latency shall be ≤ 30 s per email at p95, from ingest to draft-ready-for-review.", "Source": "input (latency); `OQ-003`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: No PII shall leave the trust boundary — PII is never sent to unauthorized tools, models, or logs.
statement: No PII shall leave the trust boundary — PII is never sent to unauthorized tools, models, or logs.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "NFR-003", "Statement": "No PII shall leave the trust boundary — PII is never sent to unauthorized tools, models, or logs.", "Source": "input (protect PII); `ASM-003`; `INV-003`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: Cost per triaged email shall stay within budget: ≤ $0.05 (model + retrieval combined), enforced by a per-run cap.
statement: Cost per triaged email shall stay within budget: ≤ $0.05 (model + retrieval combined), enforced by a per-run cap.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "NFR-004", "Statement": "Cost per triaged email shall stay within budget: ≤ $0.05 (model + retrieval combined), enforced by a per-run cap.", "Source": "input (bounded cost); `ASM-005`; `INV-005`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: Every email shall have a full, reconstructable decision trace (auditability).
statement: Every email shall have a full, reconstructable decision trace (auditability).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "NFR-005", "Statement": "Every email shall have a full, reconstructable decision trace (auditability).", "Source": "input (full audit); `INV-004`", "Priority": "MVP", "Status": "Approved"}}
